exemplar.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

strengths: Three specific real-world objects are clearly identified with authentic photographs and precise personal contexts.
Commentary consistently links each object back to the chosen IA prompt using appropriate TOK concepts (procedural knowledge, cognitive bias, authority, sense perception).
Structure is logical and coherent, avoiding mere description by offering clear justifications for each objectâs inclusion.
Use of original images and first-hand narratives reinforces the exhibitionâs real-world authenticity and TOK relevance.
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely anecdotal and would benefit from engagement with counter-perspectives or academic TOK theory.
Some assertions (e.g. reliability of senses in aesthetic judgment) are under-examined and lack reference to external evidence.
Limited use of additional sources beyond personal testimony reduces academic rigor.
Occasional drift into descriptive storytelling without deeper conceptual precision prevents the work from reaching the top band.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the student fulfills the band-7 criteria very comfortablyâidentifying three distinct objects, providing strong personal contexts, and clearly linking each to Prompt 20 with relevant TOK terminologyâthe analysis stops short of the sustained conceptual depth and counter-perspective engagement expected in the 9â10 band. The commentary is generally coherent and well-structured, yet relies heavily on anecdote and would be strengthened by triangulated examples or TOK theory. Awarding an 8 reflects the exhibitionâs robust performance and clear TOK insights, while acknowledging the minor gaps in theoretical precision and wider academic underpinning.

annotations.comment: Object 3 header is clearly presented, making the focus on 'The Atlas of Beauty' immediately recognizable.
Object 2 is clearly identified with a precise caption, ensuring the artefactâs authenticity and origin are unambiguous.
The vivid description of the Malagasy carving interaction sets strong real-world context, but lacks explicit tie back to the prompt question.
Consider describing how visual aspects of the statue contribute to your knowledge claim, deepening the TOK aesthetic analysis.
The account of bias from relying on your grandfatherâs authority demonstrates clear understanding of how trusted authorities shape knowledge.
The justification effectively ties the object back to the prompt by analysing cognitive bias and authority influence.
The opening sentence is split awkwardly; consider combining with the following paragraph to improve narrative flow.
Introduce a brief counter-perspective: discuss when reliance on authority positively guided your knowledge to add nuance.
The title clearly identifies the task as the final TOK exhibition, establishing focus from the outset.
Name is presented clearly, ensuring proper identification and professionalism.
Date format should match IB convention (e.g., â22 April 2024â) for consistency with formal requirements.
Prompt and word count are stated clearly, providing transparent context and helping to manage scope.
Object 1 is clearly labeled with a descriptive title, situating the personal artefact effectively.
The inclusion of the candidateâs own photograph reinforces authenticity and real-world context.
Vivid narrative of forgetting the shorts and receiving them builds a strong emotional link to the artefact.
Analysis remains largely anecdotal here; consider explicitly naming TOK concepts (e.g., âprocedural knowledgeâ) to strengthen theoretical grounding.
The commentary effectively links the shorts to the prompt by explaining how motivation and role-model influence shaped procedural knowledge.
The narrative describes skill development well; consider contrasting procedural knowledge with declarative knowledge to enrich analysis.
The assertion that senses are the most reliable source on beauty remains under-examined; consider engaging academic perspectives or TOK theories on sense perception.
Analyzing visual elements of the pamphlet image could strengthen links between aesthetics and sense perception.
The caption citation format varies; apply consistent IB bibliographic conventions for image sources.
The shift in perspective regarding consensus vs sensory knowledge is well described, marking strong TOK insight.
Expand the discussion by considering how consensus knowledge can also provide valuable frameworks, offering a balanced analysis.
Bibliography header needs consistent formatting and placement to align with formal IB requirements.
Only one source is listed; include additional references (e.g., TOK theory texts or external examples) to reinforce academic rigor.
Description of the exhibitionâs scope is thorough, giving clear real-world context and credible sourcing.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

three objects, but the

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
